name: gma2-lighting-skills
description: AI agent skills for grandMA2 lighting console programming. Six skills covering command syntax, show architecture, networking, macros, cue programming, and Lua scripting.
author: Emblem Projects

mcp_server.description: Connect to grandMA2 console for command execution (requires GMA_HOST, GMA_PORT environment variables)

filter_libraries.description: Color-coded filter libraries with VTE variants (21-168 objects)

matricks_libraries.description: Combinatorial MAtricks libraries with HSB color scheme (up to 625 objects)

preset_packs.description: Curated preset collections for common fixture types

macro_packs.description: Show control macro libraries with conditional logic
